name: Elemental HERO Flare Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> フレア・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Flare Scarab"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. (You do not use "Polymerization".) This card gains 400 ATK for each Spell/Trap Card on the field. During the End Phase: Shuffle this card into the Extra Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
